affected_pattern: All customers invoiced between 02:00 and 03:00 UTC on DST spring-forward day show $0
root_cause: Daylight-saving-time transition defect — the billing engine's cycle-window query used local time without DST awareness, producing a zero-duration window during the skipped hour and generating empty invoices.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: DST Transition Empty Window pattern
Invoicing job logs show cycle_window_seconds=0 for the affected batch
Known issue with jdbc driver timezone handling (US/Eastern)
recommended_action: Rerun invoicing job for the affected hour using UTC-normalized windows
Void the empty invoices and reissue correct ones
Migrate all billing windows to UTC with explicit timezone conversion at presentation
Add a regression test exercising spring-forward and fall-back days
